summary.lv: Zalaris HR Services meklē HR Tech Associate Consultant, kurš atbalstīs SAP SuccessFactors un algu sistēmu ieviešanu klientiem starptautiskos projektos. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €1400–2000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Zalaris HR Services is seeking an Associate Consultant to support delivery of SAP SuccessFactors and payroll solutions on international projects in a hybrid role in Riga, offering €1,400–2,000/month.
